name: search-consumption-cli
description: > Search the Microsoft Fabric catalog across workspaces using the Fabric Catalog Search API. Use when the user wants to: (1) find an item by display name when the workspace is unknown, (2) list or discover items of a specific type across the tenant, (3) identify which workspace contains an item, (4) return item/workspace IDs for downstream API calls. Dataflow Gen1/Gen2 items are not supported. For data queries after the item is known, use the workload-specific consumption skill (`sqldw-consumpti
author: microsoft
